_doc: Master MCP server catalog. Services pick their subset via config/mcp-profiles/*.json or by building dynamic configs at runtime (e.g. Discord bot). Env vars use ${VAR} placeholders — consumers must resolve them from .env or process.env before writing temp files.

playwright.description: Playwright MCP — headless browser automation via accessibility tree
args: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
playwright.notes: DOM/accessibility-tree primary. Vision opt-in for CAPTCHAs only. Session dirs in tools/opai-browser/data/sessions/.

teamhub.description: Team Hub workspace MCP — task/item CRUD, search, collaboration
teamhub.notes: Requires --workspace <uuid> arg per workspace. Multi-workspace: repeat --workspace flag. Talks to Team Hub API at 127.0.0.1:8089.

clickup.description: ClickUp project management — spaces, folders, tasks, comments
clickup.notes: OPAI admin task management. Hardcoded team ID in root .mcp.json.

youtube-transcript.description: OPAI YouTube transcript MCP — wraps tools/shared/youtube.py. Transcripts, metadata, keyword search.
youtube-transcript.notes: In-house MCP. No API key needed. Replaces @emit-ia and @kimtaeyoon83 third-party packages.

instagram-scraper.description: OPAI Instagram scraper MCP — wraps tools/shared/instagram.py. Reel transcripts, metadata, frame extraction, search.
instagram-scraper.notes: In-house MCP. Uses yt-dlp + Bright Data (optional) + Supadata (shared pool with YouTube). Two modes: build (tutorial extraction) and intel (content strategy).

godaddy.description: GoDaddy domain management — search, availability, registration
godaddy.notes: HTTP-based MCP. Auth handled by GoDaddy session.

hostinger.description: Hostinger API — file manager, domains, DNS, hosting ops
hostinger.notes: On-demand only. Not in root .mcp.json (avoid startup cost). Enable per-session when doing hosting tasks.

wordpress-vec.description: WordPress + WooCommerce — posts, pages, media, products
wordpress-vec.notes: Requires WP site credentials. Site-specific — one instance per WordPress site.

gws-cli.description: Google Workspace CLI (gws) — Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, and more for agent@paradisewebfl.com
gws-cli.notes: Installed via npm: @googleworkspace/cli. Auth: ~/.config/gws/credentials.json (refresh token from opai-vault). Replaces custom google-workspace MCP (archived to mcps/_archived/). Background tasks still use tools/shared/google_workspace.py directly.

boutabyte.description: BoutaByte platform — publish/manage web apps via Supabase + file API
boutabyte.notes: Phase 1 MVP. Low tool count — not a tool-search candidate.

supabase-local.description: OPAI Supabase Local MCP — vault-backed multi-project SQL, tables, migrations, logs via Management API
supabase-local.notes: In-house MCP. PATs loaded from opai-vault. Multi-project via projects.json aliases. Replaces Anthropic-hosted Supabase MCP for OPAI project access.

pencil.description: Pencil.dev — agent-driven visual design tool. Designs dashboards, landing pages, UIs via prompt. MCP auto-starts when desktop app is running.
pencil.notes: On-demand. MCP server auto-starts when Pencil desktop app is running — Claude Code auto-detects it. Launch: ./scripts/pencil.sh. CLI (experimental): File → Install pencil into PATH, then: pencil --agent-config config.json. UI kits: Shadcn, Lunaris, Halo, Nitro. Files: .pen (pure JSON).

react-grab.description: React Grab MCP — hover any React element to get component source context for agents
react-grab.notes: On-demand. Only useful during active React dev sessions. Hover element + Ctrl+C to grab context.

supabase.description: Supabase management — database, auth, storage, edge functions (Anthropic hosted)
supabase.notes: Anthropic-hosted MCP. Auto-available in Claude Code. Heaviest tool set (25+ tools) — prime candidate for tool search deferred loading.

netlify.notes: Anthropic-hosted MCP. Auto-available in Claude Code.

n8n.description: n8n workflow automation — search, execute, inspect workflows (Anthropic hosted)
n8n.notes: Anthropic-hosted MCP. INTERNAL ONLY — n8n licensing restricts customer access.

profiles._doc: Pre-built server subsets. Claude Code profiles use config/mcp-profiles/*.json launched via scripts/claude-*.sh. Internal services reference profiles here.

slim.description: Minimal — YouTube + Instagram. Best for coding sessions.

browser.description: Default — YouTube + Instagram + Playwright. Same as .mcp.json.

wordpress.description: WordPress automation — YouTube + Instagram + Playwright + WP-VEC

full.description: All local MCPs — YouTube, Instagram, Playwright, ClickUp, GoDaddy

discord-teamhub.description: Discord bot Team Hub channels — workspace MCP only
discord-teamhub.notes: Workspace IDs injected at runtime. Non-admin guilds get --allowedTools mcp__teamhub__*

helm.description: HELM business runner — WP, Netlify, Supabase, Team Hub
helm.notes: GWS CLI available system-wide (not an MCP server — invoked via shell)

workspace.description: Google Workspace — GWS CLI for interactive Drive/Gmail/Calendar/Sheets
workspace.notes: GWS CLI available system-wide (not an MCP server — invoked via shell)

benchmark.description: Benchmark scenarios — Team Hub with specific workspace

tool_search_notes.threshold: Auto-enables when MCP tools exceed ~10% of context window
tool_search_notes.current_tool_count: Combined 123 tools across 15 servers (7 removed with google-workspace MCP → GWS CLI, 7 added with Pencil.dev)
high_impact_combos: admin profile (64+ tools) — tool search critical
helm profile (51+ tools) — tool search critical
discord-teamhub (15 tools) — below threshold alone, fine without tool search
tool_search_notes.setting: ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=auto (default in Claude Code, no action needed)
